title: Exceptions to the Prescription Drug List: Closed consultation - Canada.ca
content:
## Exceptions to the Prescription Drug List: Closed consultation

## Current status: Closed
This consultation ran from July 28, 2022 to November 29, 2022.
We sought input from health care providers and other stakeholders on current exceptions to the Prescription Drug List, as part of regulatory modernization. We will use the information gathered from this consultation to inform updated health and safety rationales for exceptions to the Prescription Drug List.

## Who was the focus of this consultation
- healthcare professionals
- patients and caregivers
- health product industry
- government and regulatory partners
- other interested stakeholders
To seek your feedback on whether some exceptions to the Prescription Drug List are still required and why we prepared:
- a consultation guide
- an online questionnaire
We also wanted to know what impacts could result if these drugs were to be added to the Prescription Drug List.
- The Prescription Drug List
- Determining Prescription Status for Human and Veterinary Drugs
Exceptions to the Prescription Drug List Health Products and Food Branch policy_bureau_enquiries@hc-sc.gc.ca
